landing.heroBadge: For when you're bored in Morocco
landing.heroSubtitle: Find coffee meetups, padel games, surf sessions, hikes and more — real plans with real people near you, all across Morocco.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps from bored to booked.
landing.how1Body: Browse activities happening near you — filter by vibe, date and distance.
landing.how2Body: Tap to join in seconds. The exact spot is shared once you're in.
landing.how3Body: Show up, meet your people, and make the most of your city.
landing.feat1Body: Sport, outdoors, coffee, board games, language exchange and more.
landing.feat2Body: Exact locations stay hidden until you join. Reporting and moderation keep it clean.
landing.feat3Body: Meet face to face or join over a video call — your choice.
landing.feat4Body: From Casablanca to Dakhla — and great for travellers passing through.
landing.categoriesSubtitle: Dozens of activities across sport, outdoors and social.
landing.previewHint: A peek at what's on. Sign up free to join or host.
landing.bizTitle: Bring new faces through your door
landing.bizSubtitle: Cafés, clubs and venues: get discovered by locals looking for a place to gather. Sponsored venues show up first when hosts pick where to meet.
landing.bizPoint1: Featured placement in the venue picker and map
landing.bizPoint2: A business profile with monthly usage tracking
landing.bizPoint3: Coupons and host credits to drive footfall
landing.finalSubtitle: It's free to join — your next plan is a tap away.
landing.footerTagline: Gather & go — meet people across Morocco.

auth.badge: For when you're bored in Morocco
auth.heroSubtitle: Coffee, padel, surf, board games, hikes — find plans and people near you across Morocco, whether you live here or you're just passing through.
auth.name: Your name
auth.mockNote: Demo mode — enter anything to sign in.
auth.travelerHook: Just visiting? Find instant local plans.
auth.headline: Meet locals IRL
auth.previewHint: Sign up to join or host — it's free.
auth.photoHint: Required. Automated face/photo checks come later (backend).
auth.phoneHint: Optional and never verified — no SMS.
auth.ageError: You must be 18 or older to use hudlgo.
auth.captchaError: Please complete the CAPTCHA to continue.
auth.activeNote: Your account is active right away — no waiting, no approval.

onboarding.citySubtitle: We'll show you what's happening nearby.
onboarding.lfSubtitle: We'll tune your feed around it.
onboarding.lfPartnersHint: People to play, train and explore with
onboarding.lfBothHint: Plans and people, all of it
onboarding.activitiesSubtitle: Pick a few — you can change these later.
onboarding.levelsSubtitle: Helps us match you to the right games.

discover.nearMeUnsupported: Location isn't supported on this device.
discover.nearMeDenied: Couldn't get your location — check your browser permissions.
discover.subtitle: Here's what's happening in {{city}}
discover.noResultsHint: Try widening your search or create your own.
discover.verifyBody: Get a check mark so others know you're real. Takes a minute.

event.pendingReview: Pending admin approval — it'll appear in the feed once approved.
event.confirmHint: Confirm before it starts, or it'll be auto-cancelled an hour before.
event.confirmedToast: Activity confirmed — attendees can count on it.
event.cancelConfirm: Cancel this activity? Cancelling within 2 hours of the start lowers your trust score.
event.locationLocked: Exact location shown after you join
event.onlineNoLink: The host hasn't added a meeting link yet — check the group chat.
event.onlineLockedHint: Join to get the meeting link.

create.title: Create an event
create.orCustom: Can't find it? Create your own
create.publicPlace: This is a public place (café, park, library, track…). No private homes.
create.publicPlaceRequired: Please confirm this is a public place.
create.privateWarn: That looks like a private place — meetups must be at public venues.
create.timeRuleHint: Must start more than 4 hours from now — no same-day meetups.
create.timeRuleError: Pick a time more than 4 hours from now.
create.onlineHint: No physical venue — meet over a video call. The link is shared with people who join.
create.meetingLinkHint: Zoom, Google Meet, etc. Only people who join can see it.
create.areaHint: e.g. Maârif, Downtown — the neighborhood or district.
create.areaPrivacy: Shown publicly to everyone before they join. The exact address and pin stay hidden until someone joins — this keeps your meeting point private.
create.upgradeMore: Upgrade to host more often & pin activities →
create.unlimitedFeatured: Your Gold plan: unlimited hosting — every activity is featured. No extra fee.
create.nextFreeNotice: Next free activity in {{time}}. Choose a paid option below to host now.
create.usedNotice: You’ve used your hosting allowance for now. Choose a paid option below to host another.
create.planCoversPinned: Your {{plan}} plan covers this — it’ll be pinned to the top.
create.placeSearch: Search a place or tap the map
create.pickOnMap: Tap the map to set the point
create.minPlayersHint: Event confirms once this many join (great for team sports)
create.descPlaceholder: What should people know? Meeting point, what to bring…
create.submitted: Submitted for review — you'll be notified once it's approved.

chat.title: Chat
chat.emptyHint: Join an event to start chatting with the group.
chat.expired: This group chat has closed (24h after the meetup).
chat.ended: Activity ended — chat is now read-only.

profile.emailHint: Get activity updates and reminders by email

myEvents.title: My Events
myEvents.subtitle: Your upcoming plans
myEvents.emptyHint: Browse events or create your own

rate.title: Rate your meetup
rate.subtitle: How was the company? Your star rating stays private; a written review is shown on their profile.
rate.private: Stars are private (they feed trust scores). Any written review is public on the person's profile.

verify.title: Verification
verify.subtitle: Get a verified badge
verify.why: A quick selfie check confirms you're a real person. Verified members get a check mark beside their name — it builds trust and keeps the community safe.
verify.poseHint: Take a selfie doing exactly this so we know it's live.
verify.privacy: Your selfie is used only for verification review and isn't shown on your profile.
verify.submittedToast: Selfie submitted — we'll review it shortly.
verify.pendingBody: Thanks! Our team is reviewing your selfie. You'll get a notification once it's done.
verify.verifiedBody: A verified check mark now shows beside your name across the app.
verify.rejectedNote: Your last attempt couldn't be verified. Please retake a clear selfie matching the pose.

report.title: Report
report.subtitle: Tell us what's wrong. Our team reviews every report.
report.detailsPlaceholder: Add anything that helps us understand…
report.thanks: Thanks — our team will review this.
report.chatAttached: The group chat log will be attached for context.

start.title: You're here — help people spot you
start.notePlaceholder: e.g. blue jacket, table near the window

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Reactive moderation — reports, flags and suspensions.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.subtitle: Spotted a bug or have an idea? Help us make hudlgo better.
feedback.placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind…

common.notFoundHint: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
common.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
